title: Option to select a group of projects or subitems and automatically make each one dependent on the previous one
excerpt: Be able to use select a group of projects or subitems and have all selected get dependencies added to make each one dependent on the previous one. This would save a lot of time on projects with simple dependencies.

posts.author: jpetersen (Jess)
posts.cookedHtml: Be able to use select a group of projects or subitems and have all selected get dependencies added to make each one dependent on the previous one. This would save a lot of time on projects with simple dependencies.
